Label: Section 3.1
Issue: does not specify the types of web-ready devices supported
Correction: The DigitalHome system shall support web-ready devices including but not limited to computers, smartphones, and tablets.

Label: Section 3.2.1
Issue: does not specify the process for adding a new user account
Correction: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface for the Master User to add new user accounts, including fields for username, password, and user role.

Label: Section 3.2.2
Issue: does not specify the training duration for DH Technicians
Correction: DH Technicians shall undergo a minimum of 40 hours of training to become familiar with the functionality, architecture, and operation of the DH system product.

Label: Section 3.3
Issue: does not specify the development process to be used
Correction: The development team shall use the Agile development process specified by DigitalHomeOwner Inc.

Label: Section 3.4
Issue: does not specify the backup frequency for the home web server
Correction: The DH home web server shall perform a full backup of all user data and system configurations every 24 hours.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: does not specify the types of small appliances supported
Correction: The system shall support small appliances including but not limited to coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: Section 4.2
Issue: does not specify the response time for thermostat adjustments
Correction: The system shall adjust the thermostat settings within 5 seconds of receiving a user command.

Label: Section 4.3
Issue: does not specify the response time for humidistat adjustments
Correction: The system shall adjust the humidistat settings within 5 seconds of receiving a user command.

Label: Section 4.4
Issue: does not specify the duration for which the alarm will sound
Correction: The security alarm shall sound for a minimum of 5 minutes or until manually deactivated by the user.

Label: Section 4.5
Issue: does not specify the types of appliances managed by the Appliance Manager
Correction: The Appliance Manager shall manage appliances including but not limited to coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: Section 4.6
Issue: does not specify the format of the monthly report
Correction: The monthly report shall be provided in PDF format and include sections for temperature, humidity, security breaches, and system downtime.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: does not specify total supported number of concurrent users
Correction: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: does not specify the recovery time after a system failure
Correction: The system shall recover and restore data within 5 minutes of a failure.

Label: Section 5.3
Issue: does not specify the safety protocols for system failures
Correction: The system shall include safety protocols to ensure that in the event of a failure, all appliances are turned off and security systems are activated.

Label: Section 5.4
Issue: does not specify the encryption method for user data
Correction: The system shall use AES-256 encryption for all user data.

Label: Section 5.5
Issue: does not specify the frequency of maintenance updates
Correction: The system shall receive maintenance updates at least once every quarter.

Label: Section 5.6
Issue: does not specify the process for document updates
Correction: All system documents shall be reviewed and updated at the end of each project phase.

Label: Section 5.7
Issue: does not specify the update frequency for the FAQ section
Correction: The FAQ section shall be updated at least once every quarter to reflect new features and common user issues.
